blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,253 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 47 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: dry, highs of 40°F, gusts to 47 mph.
Tomorrow: 3.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
